infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: V.A.K needs your location to verify you are at the workplace for clock-in and clock-out compliance.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: V.A.K needs camera access to take a selfie for shift verification.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow V.A.K to access your photos to attach food wastage images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow V.A.K to use your camera to take food wastage photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow V.A.K to use your location to verify workplace compliance.
